description: Golden vectors for EntropyPool hash-chain (P0-010). All values derived from SHA3-256 chain.

cases.name: zero_seed_first_block_hex
cases.description: SHA3-256([0u8;32] || LE64(0)) — first hash-chain output from zero seed
cases.output_hex: SHA3-256(seed || counter=0) — computed at runtime by golden_first_u64_from_zero_seed test

cases.name: zero_seed_first_u64_le
cases.description: First 8 bytes of SHA3-256([0u8;32] || LE64(0)) interpreted as LE u64
cases.note: Verified by golden_first_u64_from_zero_seed test in pool.rs

cases.name: different_seeds_differ
cases.description: Seed [0u8;32] and seed [1,0,...,0] produce different first outputs

cases.name: sequential_draws_differ
cases.description: Draw 0 and draw 1 from zero seed produce different 32-byte blocks

cases.name: fork_determinism
cases.description: Two pools with same seed, both forked at counter=0, produce identical child output

cases.name: from_seed_bytes_lyra_test
cases.note: Seed is SHA3-256(b'lyra-test-seed'); output verified by from_seed_bytes_deterministic test
